user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about the fictional game universe and gameplay guidance?
model_response:
1) pepperoni 🍕  
2) black holes form when massive stars collapse under their own gravity after exhausting their fuel  
3) think it through first, don’t rush it!  
4) in the game universe, always explore every corner for hidden quests and loot! ✨
